case_title: BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE VS. MARTHA L UGARTE ORTIZ

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-06-2018 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100042268)

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ERIN E. PATTERSON, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-06-2018, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-26-2018. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Mitchell Wong, Esq., appearing specially for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. For good cause, the Court ordered that the $400.00 sanction imposed on Erin Patterson, Esq. for failure to appear at the Nov-06-2018 OSC hearing is rescinded .Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-08-2018 Continued To Feb-05-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to FEB-05-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: NEWTON LAM; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
